fields.name: template
fields.label: Page Template
fields.description: Controls the page layout and loads template-specific styles

fields.name: og:image
fields.label: Social Share Image
fields.description: Image shown when this page is shared on social media (OG Image)

fields.name: robots
fields.label: Search Engine Indexing
fields.description: Controls whether search engines index this page

fields.name: canonical
fields.label: Canonical URL
fields.description: Override the canonical URL for this page (leave blank to use page URL)

fields.name: experiment
fields.label: A/B Experiment ID
fields.description: Assign this page to an A/B test (e.g. hero-cta-test). Visitors are randomly split 50/50 between control and variant-a.

fields.name: experiment-variant
fields.label: Force Experiment Variant (QA)
fields.description: Pin a specific variant for QA/preview. Leave blank for random assignment.

fields.name: hreflang
fields.label: Language Alternates (hreflang)
fields.description: Comma-separated lang:url pairs e.g. en:https://site.com/home, fr:https://site.com/fr/home, x-default:https://site.com/home

fields.name: breadcrumb
fields.label: Breadcrumb
fields.description: Show or hide the auto-generated breadcrumb on this page. Default is on for pages 2+ levels deep.
